name: Apeloa Pharmaceutical Co.,Ltd
summary: Apeloa Pharmaceutical Co.,Ltd researches and develops, produces, and sells pharmaceutical products in China and internationally. It provides products in the cardio-cerebrovascular, anti-infection, anti-viral, anti-tumor, and other treatment areas. The company offers preparations, raw material intermediates, and veterinary drugs primarily under the Tianliwei, Beshin, Yosemade, Jutai, and other brands. It also provides contract research and development, and production services for pharmaceutical companies. The company is headquartered in Dongyang, China.
